candidate_summary: Lead-LLM high-T improvises verse line; K-chorus fixed-pattern responder LLMs; final-syllable content-gate g selects C_g for completion + whole-line repeat; improvisation-match reward (novel + matchable); torro low-frequency anchor third channel ties lead+chorus.
content_words: lead-improvise high-T LLM emit-line + chorus-fixed K-pattern bank
final-syllable gate-signal g content-selected chorus activation
improvisation-match cross-verifier reward novel + matchable line
torro low-frequency anchor third-channel tie lead+chorus
estonian seto leelo polyphonic lead chorus

results.name: MoE LLMs Survey 256-Expert Dynamic Routing
results.rationale: Dynamic routing parallels gate-selecting one chorus but MoE routes per-token to FFN experts not whole fixed-pattern responders + no improvisation-match + no anchor-token.

results.name: Read-ME Router-Decoupled MoE
results.rationale: Decoupled router structurally close to final-syllable gate but still token-level FFN routing + no lead/chorus role asymmetry.

results.name: Mixture In-Context Experts
results.rationale: In-context experts mix attention spans; weak analogy to chorus responders + no single-activation gate.

results.name: SinkTrack Attention Sink BOS Anchor
results.rationale: BOS-as-anchor strongly matches torro low-frequency anchor; lacks gate-routing chorus-bank + improvisation-match.

results.name: Gated Attention LLMs Sigmoid Post-SDPA
results.rationale: Post-SDPA sigmoid gate mirrors final-syllable content-gate; differs in gating attention outputs vs selecting K fixed-pattern responder LLMs.

results.name: StreamingLLM Attention Sinks
results.rationale: Attention-sink tokens parallel torro low-frequency anchor; lacks lead-improvise/chorus-fixed routing + cross-verifier improvisation-match.

results.name: Unified Routing Cascading ICLR 2025
results.rationale: Cascading routing across multiple LLMs maps onto selecting C_g but cascades optimize cost/quality not antiphonal repeat-whole-line + no anchor + no novelty.

results.name: Qwen3 Attention Gating NeurIPS 2025
results.rationale: Learned attention gating with content-conditioned selection aligns with final-syllable gate; still intra-model head gating not inter-agent lead+chorus orchestration.

decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; gaps: no novelty+matchable improvisation reward with gated chorus selection + no low-frequency anchor combined with role-asymmetric lead-improv vs fixed-pattern responder bank + no final-syllable phonological-boundary gating cue. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.88 / func 0.78-0.88 on MoE-routing + attention-gating + attention-sink adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
